rializable public class UnsizedArrayToken extends ArrayToken A token that represents an array. This token type exists solely so that types can be declared through the parameter mechanism using a token value, since we don't represent types distinct

ken value, since we don't represent types distinctly from tokens. Generally speaking actors should process ArrayTokens, which properly report their length. Since: Ptolemy II 6.1 Version: $Id: UnsizedArrayToken.java,v 1.3 2007/12/06 19:48:24 cxh Exp
